Title: Create Project Workspace
I want: to select a project type and a custom folder name then browse to a destination and create a pre-configured workspace with one click
So that: I can start AI-assisted development immediately with the right template and safety controls already in place
Acceptance Criteria: 1. Project type dropdown lists all available template types (Coding; Creative / Marketing); 2. User can enter a custom folder name — invalid characters or duplicate names are rejected with a clear inline message; 3. User can browse to any writable destination folder via a native OS dialog; 4. Clicking Create Project copies the selected template to <destination>/<folder_name>/; 5. The UI shows a success message or an actionable error after the action; 6. When Open VS Code is checked and creation succeeds VS Code opens the new workspace automatically; 7. The Open VS Code checkbox is greyed out if VS Code is not detected on the system
